Home | About Us | Careers
Careers

Red Apron is proud to be women-led and women-powered, with a team that includes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and New Canadian voices.

We hire people at all stages of life, from first jobs to semi-retirement, and we actively support New Canadians navigating language barriers and cultural transitions.

We know that better food starts with better workplaces, and inclusion is at the heart of that. our team reflects diverse ages, backgrounds, and lived experiences.

We infuse pleasure and pride into food and work. Food should be a source of joy, not stress. Our meals are thoughtfully composed to be as beautiful and satisfying as they are practical and nourishing.

We also believe joy should be felt behind the scenes. That’s why we design our workplace to be inclusive, supportive, and respectful —where creativity and laughter live alongside hard work and craftsmanship.
